wins.event: Q2 revenue $15B record, +20% YoY all organic; EBITDA $10B (+35% YoY)
AI revenue $4.4B (+46% YoY); 9 consecutive quarters of growth; AI networking +170% YoY
Q3 AI guide $5.1B (+60% YoY); 2025 AI growth rate expected to sustain into 2026
Tomahawk 6 launched (102.4 Tbps); flattens 100K-XPU clusters from 3 to 2 tiers
VCF: 87% of largest 10K customers adopted; double-digit ARR growth in core software

risks.event: Non-AI semi revenue $4B, -5% YoY; recovery slow; Industrial down, wireless seasonally down
Industrial expected to remain weak in Q3

guidance.notes: Q3 guide $15.8B (+21% YoY); AI sustaining 2025 growth rate into 2026 due to inference demand surge. EBITDA target ≥66%.

_notes: Inference demand acceleration drives forward 2026 AI growth narrative. Tomahawk 6 launch consolidates Ethernet leadership. Customer base expanding.
